**To reproduce:** Run the following command from the project root:
```bash
cd playground/filemaker-removal-requirements && node playground.js __preflight__
```
reproduction_steps: Review failed checks and remediation attempts above
Fix the underlying issues (server not running, code not deployed, etc.)

resolution.solutionApplied: Created tsconfig.json and typescript.ts files to satisfy ts-node's module resolution requirements in the playground directory. The devFlow tool was attempting to execute the playground.js script through ts-node, which expected TypeScript configuration files that didn't exist in this JavaScript-only project.

errors.title: Investigate: Environment detection without FileMaker failure
errors.description:
## What Failed
Unknown failure pattern

## Scenario
- **Feature**: filemaker-removal-requirements
- **Scenario**: Environment detection without FileMaker
- **ID**: SCN-1768140949525-ffp3

## Error Message
```
Assertion: FileMaker integration removal status
Execution failed
Scenario failed
```

## Test Outputs
- ✓ **requirements_check**: {"projectRoot":true,"packageJson":true,"srcDirectory":true,"envFile":true,"nodeModules":true,"buildScript":true}
- ✓ **dataService_exists**: true
- ✓ **environment_types_found**: {"found":true,"matches":["src/services/dataService.js:export const ENVIRONMENT_TYPES = {","src/services/dataService.js:    type: ENVIRONMENT_TYPES.WEBAPP,"],"count":2}
- ✓ **auth_methods_found**: {"found":true,"matches":["src/services/dataService.js:export const AUTH_METHODS = {"],"count":1}
- ✓ **signin_component_exists**: true
- ✓ **detectFileMaker_function_found**: {"found":false,"matches":[],"count":0}
- ✓ **scenario_result**: {"dataServiceExists":true,"hasEnvironmentTypes":true,"hasAuthMethods":true,"signInExists":true,"hasDetectFileMaker":false}

## Expected Outputs
- **environment detection result**: should return WEBAPP environment type and SUPABASE auth method when window.FileMaker is undefined
- **backend API response**: should return data structure compatible with FileMaker response format when routing through backend
- **authentication state**: should contain valid Supabase session with user ID and access token when using SUPABASE auth method
- **HMAC authorization header**: should generate valid HMAC header in format 'Bearer {signature}.{timestamp}' for backend requests
- **data service routing decision**: should route to backend API when environmentType is WEBAPP and useFileMaker flag is false
- **FileMaker integration removal status**: should return no matches when grepping codebase for FileMaker references after removal

## Reproduction
```bash
cd playground/filemaker-removal-requirements && node playground.js environment-detection-without-filemaker
```

## Logs
See full execution log: `playground/filemaker-removal-requirements/results/environment-detection-without-filemaker/execution.jsonl`

## Fix Approach
This is a bug in existing code or configuration. Investigate the error, identify the root cause, and fix the implementation.

Assertion: FileMaker integration removal status
Execution failed
Scenario failed
reproduction_steps: Run: cd playground/filemaker-removal-requirements && node playground.js environment-detection-without-filemaker
Check execution.jsonl for detailed event log

playgroundContext.scenarioDescription: Verify app correctly detects web app environment when FileMaker objects are absent

expectedOutputs.name: environment detection result
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return WEBAPP environment type and SUPABASE auth method when window.FileMaker is undefined

expectedOutputs.name: backend API response
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return data structure compatible with FileMaker response format when routing through backend

expectedOutputs.name: authentication state
expectedOutputs.assertion: should contain valid Supabase session with user ID and access token when using SUPABASE auth method

expectedOutputs.name: HMAC authorization header
expectedOutputs.assertion: should generate valid HMAC header in format 'Bearer {signature}.{timestamp}' for backend requests

expectedOutputs.name: data service routing decision
expectedOutputs.assertion: should route to backend API when environmentType is WEBAPP and useFileMaker flag is false

expectedOutputs.name: FileMaker integration removal status
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return no matches when grepping codebase for FileMaker references after removal
